task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URL in the format 's3://bucket-name.region.amazonaws.com'. Return the region name.
Create a JSON object that represents an AWS IAM policy allowing read-only access to a specific S3 bucket named 'my-data-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that matches valid AWS access key IDs, which always start with 'AKIA' followed by 16 alphanumeric characters.
